priority.when: Use first to inspect the business-blueprints sources, generated artifact areas, and comparable repository locations
priority.why: Folder structure and existing repository patterns should guide generation decisions

priority.when: Use after locating candidate blueprint sources and existing JSON/helper examples
priority.why: Reading source documents together with repository examples reduces schema drift

priority.when: Use to find existing business object generation helpers, import functions, catalog patterns, or comparable JSON structures
priority.why: Repository search helps the mode reuse existing capabilities instead of inventing new formats

priority.when: Use for creating new generated JSON artifacts, catalogs, or companion summary files
priority.why: Generation work commonly creates new files rather than editing existing ones

priority.when: Use only for targeted updates to existing catalog or related configuration files
priority.why: Precise edits reduce accidental disruption to surrounding configuration or metadata

priority.when: Use only when a repository-local helper command supports artifact generation or validation
priority.why: Commands can reuse existing automation, but should not blur the mode boundary into packaging or deployment

best_practices.practice: Inspect business-blueprints before assuming source document layout
Inspect comparable output or helper locations before choosing generation paths
Read source blueprint files together with existing JSON examples and generation helpers whenever possible
Use focused line ranges for large helper files to keep context efficient
Search for existing business object import or generation functions before designing output structure
Search for catalog-related patterns to keep handoff artifacts consistent with later workflows
Use for new JSON artifacts, catalogs, and generation summaries
Write complete file contents with deterministic structure
Prefer apply_diff when adjusting an existing catalog or configuration file instead of rewriting it fully
Read the current file first to ensure exact diff matching
Use only repository-local helper commands that directly support business object generation or validation
Do not use packaging or deployment commands in this mode

boundary_rules.rule: Do not package generated artifacts into TWX outputs in this mode
Do not deploy generated artifacts to BAW servers in this mode
When the task shifts to packaging or deployment, hand off to baw-package-manager
